description: Evidence-backed public sample VIs used to certify headless compare and history rendering lanes above the minimal local fixtures.

targets.label: labview-icon-editor Settings Init.vi history seed

reasons: Checked-in history fixture lineage already exists in this repository.
Public PR VI History workflow evidence exists on the upstream repository.

publicEvidence.note: Public PR VI History workflow succeeded on the upstream MIT-licensed repository.
Org-owned PR VI History rollout kept the public workflow surface active for this repository.

notes: Public evidence is repository-level; target-specific lineage is anchored by the checked-in fixture under fixtures/cross-repo/labview-icon-editor/settings-init.
This seed keeps the Windows-mirror VI history lane tied to a licensed public source repository.

targets.label: labview-icon-editor-demo VIP_Pre-Install Custom Action.vi proof PR

reasons: Target-specific public proof PR and workflow runs already exist.
The sample exercises changed-VI discovery and rendered review surfaces on a real VI change.

publicEvidence.note: Standing proof PR carrying the real modified VI used for downstream CompareVI History validation.
Pull request diagnostics workflow succeeded on the real modified VI change.
Diagnostics publish workflow succeeded and rendered the reviewer surface.
Agent canary workflow succeeded on the same proof surface.

notes: This seed is the cleanest public target-specific proof currently available for CompareVI History reviewer rendering.
No checked-in local fixture is required because the public PR and workflow evidence are already target-specific.

targets.label: labview-icon-editor-demo CanaryProbe.vi licensed added-VI print candidate

reasons: MIT-licensed public consumer repository with a pinned added-VI proof PR.
Public CompareVI History diagnostics succeeded on the added-VI PR head and recorded CanaryProbe.vi as an added target.
The published public evidence is still history-surface only, so standalone PrintToSingleFileHtml certification remains unproven.

notes: The candidate now points at the repo-owned BSD-3 PrintToSingleFileHtml source bundle under fixtures/headless-corpus/operation-payloads/PrintToSingleFileHtml/.

Public evidence for this licensed sample currently proves added-VI discovery and history publication only, so the repo-owned replacement payload stays research-only until runnable operation files and a standalone print proof run exist.

publicEvidence.note: Merged public PR that added CanaryProbe.vi and its variants on the MIT-licensed consumer repository.

CompareVI History pull-request diagnostics succeeded on the added-VI PR head and recorded CanaryProbe.vi as an added target, but the published receipts remained history-surface artifacts rather than standalone print-single-file proof.

notes: This target narrows the remaining blocker from sample licensing to runnable print-surface evidence: the sample repository is licensed and pinned, and the replacement payload provenance is repo-owned, but the public proof still needs an explicit PrintToSingleFileHtml run.
Keep this seed provisional until a public workflow publishes print-single-file receipts for the same or an equivalent licensed added/deleted VI.

targets.label: linuxContainerDemo NewThing.vi added-VI print path

reasons: Public successful Linux workflow evidence exists for the added-VI print path.
The repository currently declares no license, so this seed cannot be promoted to accepted status yet.
The sample still documents the best available public added-VI PrintToSingleFileHtml pattern for research and future replacement.

notes: The public proof depends on a custom AdditionalOperationDirectory payload checked into VICompareTooling/PrintToSingleFileHtml.
That payload remains research-only here because the source repository does not currently declare a license.

publicEvidence.note: Public PR carrying the change-kind-aware VI compare and print surface, including NewThing.vi as an added VI.
Linux VI Compare workflow succeeded on the PR head after change-kind rendering landed.
Linux headless LabVIEWCLI workflow succeeded on the same PR head.

notes: Keep this seed provisional until licensing is explicit and a replacement accepted sample is available.
Do not use this target as a blocking accepted corpus lane while it remains license-ambiguous.
This seed currently covers Linux-only public evidence; it does not establish Windows parity.
